build_system: Flutter SDK with pub package manager
test_framework: flutter_test (built-in), widget tests and unit tests
build_command: flutter build apk --debug (Android) or flutter analyze for lint
verification_instructions: 1. Run flutter analyze to check for lint errors. 2. Run flutter test to run all unit and widget tests. 3. Verify project structure matches Flutter conventions.
setup_instructions: 1. Install Flutter SDK via git clone. 2. Add to PATH. 3. Run flutter doctor. 4. Run flutter pub get in project directory.
environment_constraints: Linux x86_64 Amazon Linux 2023. No Android SDK/emulator available - cannot run app or build APK. Can run flutter analyze and flutter test. Flutter must be installed from scratch. Java 25 available.
contribution_requirements: Standard Flutter project conventions. Clean separation of game logic, UI, and AI modules.
key_patterns: CustomPainter for board rendering, Provider or similar for state management, separate directories for models, logic, ui, and ai
directory_structure: Standard Flutter project: lib/ (source), test/ (tests), android/ (Android config), ios/ (iOS config), pubspec.yaml (dependencies)
